name: 圣光治疗
description: 消耗1AP，为己方生命值最低的棋子恢复8点生命
code: function executeCard(context) { const battle = context.battle; const playerId = context.playerId; const player = battle.players.find(function(p) { return p.playerId === playerId; }); if (!player || player.actionPoints < 1) { return { success: false, message: 'AP不足' }; } const allies = battle.pieces.filter(function(p) { return p.faction === player.faction && p.currentHp > 0; }); if (allies.length === 0) { return { success: false, message: '没有友方' }; } const target = allies.sort(function(a, b) { return a.currentHp - b.currentHp; })[0]; player.actionPoints -= 1; const result = healDamage(target, target, 8, battle, 'holy-heal'); return { success: true, message: '圣光治疗为' + target.name + '恢复' + result.heal + '点生命' }; }
